claim_boundary: This is a real dbt/MetricFlow validator control over a minimal public DuckDB semantic-layer project. It validates MetricFlow semantics and demonstrates what metrics-as-code catches; it does not model natural-language caliber selection, refusal/disclosure, or coverage witnesses.
